noTouch: dashboard UI or operator HTTP usage endpoint

checks.browser: skip: local policy gateway API endpoint only; no browser UI changes in scope

downshiftProof: route-local because the slice adds one local policy gateway endpoint plus focused tests/docs/smoke assertions; it does not add real network calls, Docker, sponsor keys, durable storage, dashboard UI, or SDK public API changes
knownFailures: Policy simulation tests first failed with 404 NotFound before the endpoint was implemented; expected TDD red state.
notes: Adds POST /v1/policy/simulate as an authenticated local-only preflight that evaluates the existing policy engine against current in-memory counters without proxying to IOTA Gas Station, creating reservations, mutating quota counters, or emitting reserve/execute decision events.
